content.situation: 导游在集合点迎接游客团队，微笑着打招呼并自我介绍
content.speakerText: Good morning, everyone! I'm Alex, your guide for this tour. I hope you're all excited to explore!
content.speakerTextCn: 大家早上好！我是亚历克斯，今天你们的导游，希望你们都充满期待！
content.responseTemplate: Hi Alex! We're ___ to be here.
content.hint: 用积极情绪回应导游的热情问候

content.situation: 导游提醒游客如有问题可以随时找他，游客礼貌回应表示理解
content.speakerText: If you need anything during the tour, don't hesitate to ask me!
content.speakerTextCn: 如果游览期间有任何需要，尽管问我！
content.responseTemplate: Thank you! I'll ___ if I have questions.
content.hint: 表达你会主动寻求帮助，体现积极沟通态度

content.situation: 导游欢迎团队并简短介绍行程，游客礼貌回应表示感谢和期待
content.speakerText: Welcome! Today we'll be visiting some amazing spots. I'm sure you'll love it!
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎！今天我们会参观一些精彩景点，我相信你们会喜欢的！
content.responseTemplate: That sounds wonderful! I'm really ___ to see them.
content.hint: 使用固定搭配表达对即将发生事情的期待
content.knowledgePoint: 使用 'look forward to' 表达期待
